abstract: Paul Phillips will talk about collections for Scala. "Based on my extensive experience with scala collections, I'm writing my own. The focus is much tighter: immutable, performant, predictable, correct. The talk will alternate between why the scala collections manage none of those things, and how I hope to do better." Paul Phillips is a co-founder of Typesafe and the most prolific committer to Scala. Location: LinkedIn Schedule: • 6:30-7:00 - networking • 7:00-7:10 - announcements etc • 7:10-~8:40 - talk • 8:40-9:00 - networking
event_title: Paul Phillips, "psp collections: views and more"
title: Paul Phillips, "psp collections: views and more"
